title: alsine edwardsii
intro: Alsine edwardsii, also known as Edwards' saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alsine edwardsii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its extracts as a topical cream or ointment.
